Notes: Concordia ranked No. 20..Laura Kramer scores carer-high 19 points and ties a
career-high with 12 rebounds for her second double-double of the season and
fourth of her career...Megan Stadler ties Dani Coleman's 401 career assists
and is now tied for No. 3 in school history..Zoraa Quoie's 23 points leads CU.
Game.Officials: Ben Franson,  Dave Klundt,  Rock Messerschmidt
